stemHtml: To apply for a banner towing rating, you must have completed…

options.a: At least 100 hours flight time and 200 take-offs and landings as PIC on aeroplanes or TMGs, after licence issue.
options.b: At least 200 hours flight time and 100 take-offs and landings as PIC on aeroplanes or TMGs, after licence issue.
options.c: At least 150 hours flight time and 250 take-offs and landings as PIC on aeroplanes or TMGs, after licence issue.
options.d: At least 50 hours flight time and 100 take-offs and landings as PIC on aeroplanes or TMGs, after licence issue.
